excluded.reason: CPT block is editor-only with bg-accent card. No dark mode variant.
CPT block has no PHP render file. No frontend output to test.
CPT block has no PHP render file. Sync check not applicable.
CPT block renders inside the block editor canvas at fixed width. No responsive breakpoints.
Editor-only block. Image lazy loading is handled by WordPress editor infrastructure.
Editor-only block. Srcset is handled by the frontend card template, not the CPT block.

extra.description: Photo meta field (integer type) is registered and appears in REST API response for team_member posts
Template lock is enforced: takt/team-member-cpt block is auto-inserted when creating a new team_member post and cannot be removed
Inserter restriction: takt/team-member-cpt does NOT appear in block inserter search
Auto-title sync: changing first_name or last_name updates the post title to 'first_name last_name'
Excerpt field (role/job title) persists after save/reload via editPost({ excerpt: value })
Department taxonomy term displays read-only in block body when assigned
PluginDocumentSettingPanel renders in Post tab with all fields: first_name, last_name, role (excerpt), photo
Sidebar panel only renders for team_member post type (post type guard)
Dual-location sync: editing first_name in block body updates the sidebar panel value and vice versa
Photo displays in block body preview when set via ImageDropUploader, with correct aspect ratio (395/317) and rounded-xl styling
